players.injury_note: Anderson (knee) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Magic.
Isaac (knee) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Timberwolves.
Richardson has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Timberwolves due to lower-back spasms.
Wagner will be sidelined indefinitely after recent tests showed that he requires additional time and rehabilitation for soreness in his left high ankle sprain, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.
Cunningham (quadriceps) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Nets.
Duren is probable for Saturday's game versus the Nets due to low back spasms.
Thompson (ankle) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Nets.
Demin (foot) is out for Saturday's game in Detroit.
Kuminga (knee) is questionable for Saturday's game against the 76ers.
Broome underwent a successful partial meniscectomy Saturday to address a lateral meniscus tear in his right knee, per Adam Zagoria of ZagsBlog.com.
Edgecombe (back) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Hawks.
Embiid (oblique) will be re-evaluated in approximately one week, Noah Levick of NBC Sports Philadelphia reports.
The NBA suspended George for 25 games Saturday for violating the league's Anti-Drug program.
Aldama (knee) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Clippers.
The Grizzlies announced Thursday that Caldwell-Pope underwent surgery to address the misalignment of his right pinky finger and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 campaign.
The Grizzlies announced Sunday that Clarke (calf) will be re-evaluated in two weeks.
Edey underwent surgery Tuesday to resolve discomfort and bone stress in his left ankle, and he'll miss the rest of the 2025-26 season.
Gibson (reconditioning) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Clippers.
The Grizzlies announced Thursday that Morant is still experiencing discomfort in his left elbow and will be reevaluated by medical staff in two weeks.
Beal will undergo season-ending surgery on his left hip, ESPN's Shams Charania reports.
Collins (neck) won't travel with the Clippers for their upcoming two-game road trip, Tomer Azarly of ClutchPoints.com reports.
Niederhauser has been diagnosed with a Lisfranc injury in his right foot and will require surgery. He's been ruled out for the remainder of the 2025-26 season, Joey Linn of SI.com reports.
Porter (knee) will not play Saturday against the Jazz.

The Bucks applied for a Disabled Player Exception for Prince earlier this month, indicating that they anticipate that he's "substantially more likely than not" to be unable to play through June 15, Eric Nehm of The Athletic reports.
Collier (personal) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Bucks.
Jackson was diagnosed with a localized PVNS growth in his left knee and will miss the remainder of the season, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.
Kessler will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season, Tony Jones of The Athletic reports.
Utah will re-evaluate Markkanen in two weeks after Thursday's MRI showed symptomatic hip impingement with associated inflammation and bone bruise, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.
Nurkic is scheduled to undergo season-ending nose surgery Wednesday, Chris Haynes of NBA TV reports.
Williams has been diagnosed with a torn left ACL and will miss the remainder of the season, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.
Carlson (back) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Warriors.
Caruso (hip) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Warriors, Brandon Rahbar of DailyThunder.com reports.
Hartenstein (calf) has been ruled out for Saturday's game versus the Warriors, Brandon Rahbar of DailyThunder.com reports.
Mitchell (ankle/abdomen) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Warriors.
The Thunder announced Friday that Sorber has sustained a torn ACL in his right knee during an offseason workout, NBA reporter Marc Stein reports.
Williams (hamstring) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Warriors.
Butler underwent successful surgery Monday to repair a torn right anterior cruciate ligament.
Curry (back) is questionable for Saturday's game against the Thunder.
Curry (knee) will be re-evaluated in 10 days, Anthony Slater of ESPN.com reports.
Melton (knee) is questionable for Saturday's game against the Thunder.
Moody (wrist) won't play Saturday in Oklahoma City.
Payton (ankle) is probable for Saturday's game in Oklahoma City.
Porzingis (illness) has been listed as questionable for Saturday's game against the Thunder.
Richard (ankle) is questionable to play Saturday against the Thunder.
